audit_items.proof_trace: Lines 350-356 branch on `if (asset == s_assetOut)` using a direct storage read: the if-branch transfers the full contract balance to `s_assetOutReceiver` without touching `s_auctionStarts`; `s_auctionStarts[asset] = block.timestamp` at line 353 is exclusively in the else-branch. The balance forwarded at line 351 is the full `balanceOf(address(this))` after `transferForSwap` has already moved funds in at line 321.
